name: Allometric Scaling of Testosterone Enanthate Pharmacokinetics
snippet: Although many testosterone formulations are approved for the treatment of hypogonadism in adult men, only intramuscular (IM) testosterone enanthate (TE) and testosterone pellets have been approved for adolescent males.
